text:

see above diff

diff -ruN pngcrush/Makefile pngcrush.new/Makefile

+++ pngcrush.new/Makefile	Tue Dec 19 10:55:05 2000

 #
 
 PORTNAME=	pngcrush
-PORTVERSION=	1.5.1

 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	pmt

+++ pngcrush.new/distinfo	Tue Dec 19 10:55:26 2000
